title: ClusterProfile
description: Output of preflight.run(). Hardware peaks + RCCL baseline curves (3 scopes) + cluster-level env_baseline + blacklist refs. Reused across jobs by version + age. See README.md §8.1, skills/workflow/preflight.md. Schema 2.0 changes: rccl_baseline restructured into {intra_node, inter_node, world} scopes; intra_node uses per-node columnar layout to capture node-level uniformity. Single-node mode populates intra_node only and leaves inter_node/world as null.

schema_version.description: ClusterProfile schema version. Bumped to 2.0 when rccl_baseline became scoped (intra_node/inter_node/world).

cluster_id.description: Stable cluster identifier; cache key together with version.

version.description: Auto-incremented on full re-collect; preserved across delta-refresh. E.g. 'mi300x-16node-v4'.

cluster_class.description: Coarse hardware class for cross-cluster reuse; e.g. 'mi300x_8gpu', 'h100_8gpu'.

status.description: validated = all gates pass; tentative = at least one soft gate fired; stale = age > 7d, awaiting refresh; superseded = a newer version exists.

supersedes.description: Prior version (same cluster_id) that this one replaces; null on first collect.

nodes_blacklisted.description: Node ids excluded due to blacklist hits (read from state/blacklist.yaml).

peak_tflops_bf16.description: Measured BF16 GEMM peak (TFLOPS), median across healthy nodes.

peak_tflops_fp8.description: FP8 peak when hardware supports; null when not measured.

per_gpu_tflops_bf16.description: Per-GPU BF16 GEMM TFLOPs (representative node, single-node mode); used to compute per_node_variance_pct.

bandwidth_gbs.description: Per-GPU effective inter-node BW; null in single-node mode.

rccl_baseline.description: RCCL bandwidth curves measured at three scopes. `intra_node` is per-node columnar (each node runs its own local 8-GPU PG; results aggregated to expose per-node uniformity). `inter_node` and `world` are single-ring measurements across the whole allocation. Single-node mode fills `intra_node` only; `inter_node` and `world` are null.

intra_node.description: Within-node 8-GPU collectives (xGMI/NVLink only). Embarrassingly parallel across nodes — each node runs an independent local torchrun. Per-node curves let us spot stragglers without O(N²) pairwise tests.

world_size.description: GPUs participating in each per-node PG (== gpus_per_node).

nnodes_measured.description: How many nodes we ran the local 8-GPU benchmark on. Should equal nodes_healthy in steady state.

collectives.description: Per-collective per-node bandwidth/latency curves + roll_up summary stats.

inter_node.description: 1-GPU-per-node ring. Isolates inter-node fabric (RoCE/IB) from xGMI confounder. Single curve across all nodes; null in single-node mode.

world.description: Full N×gpus_per_node ring (the actual training topology). Single curve. Null in single-node mode.

collectives.description: Per-collective single-ring curve at the full cluster scope.

env_baseline.description: Cluster-level golden default env. Versioned and validated via env_probe 3-tier protocol.

version.description: Mirrors top-level version; identical except when delta-refresh changed only this block.

status.description: validated = passed all 3 tiers; tentative = passed T1+T2 only; unsafe_fallback = vendor defaults, T1 failed.

source.description: Origin of the candidate before validation.

threading.description: OMP_*, MKL_*, numactl bindings; see skills/env/threading.md.

notes.description: Human-readable warnings; e.g. 'rccl_underperformance detected, T2 recovered'.

warnings.description: Cluster-level warnings surfaced for downstream stages; e.g. 'node mi300x-04 thermal margin -5C below median'.

per_node_collective.description: Per-collective curve in `intra_node` scope. Shared `sizes_mb` axis across all nodes; bw/latency stored as per-node arrays aligned to that axis. `roll_up` provides cross-node aggregate stats for fast consumption by PROJECTION.

sizes_mb.description: Message sizes (in MiB) sampled. Same axis for all per_node_*/roll_up arrays in this collective.

per_node_bw_gbs.description: Map: hostname -> bus-bandwidth array aligned to sizes_mb.

per_node_latency_us.description: Map: hostname -> latency array aligned to sizes_mb.

roll_up.description: Cross-node aggregates aligned to sizes_mb. PROJECTION should consume `median_bw_gbs` for typical case and `min_bw_gbs` for worst-case bounds.

slow_nodes_at_max_size.description: Hostnames whose bw at the largest sampled size is < median - 2*stddev. Candidates for blacklist proposal.

single_ring_collective.description: Per-collective curve in single-ring scopes (inter_node, world). Just bw/latency aligned to sizes_mb.
